params.ChoiceTitle: Choose a card exiled with Reflection Net
params.SpellDescription: Target creature you control becomes a copy of a creature card exiled with CARDNAME. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.

remaining_params.ChoiceTitle: Choose a card exiled with Reflection Net
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target creature you control becomes a copy of a creature card exiled with CARDNAME. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, exile target creature until CARDNAME leaves the battlefield.
